notes: MacStreamingServer (hand-rolled on Network.framework), StreamTLSCertificate for TLS identity. Bonjour LAN primary + Tailscale 100.x on the same port 7342 (IPv4-only listener, dual-stack silently unreachable over Tailscale utun -- fixed in current code).

Two discovery paths: (1) LAN mDNS via BonjourAdvertiser, v2 pinned-HTTPS contract matching Mac; (2) iCloud Drive file relay (ICloudEndpointWriter) -- writes an active entry (incl. Tailscale address) only when both a Tailscale address AND a cert pin exist, else an inactive sentinel. Requires iCloud for Windows installed for path 2; LAN-only clients pair without it.

source: bibliofuse-nas/docs/synology-package.md; bibliofuse-nas-distribution README + v0.1.3 release notes
notes: Generic x86_64 release-candidate .spk exists locally (deploy/synology-spk/build-spk.sh output) but v0.1.3 release notes say native-client checks (local Wi-Fi + Tailscale) remain open release gates as of 2026-07-19. Zero-config folder picker -- no path typing, no library duplication.

"Released iOS / visionOS apps with Docker: Not supported yet." Free server + free browser reader (port 7343) both work today; no native-app connection flow exists yet, not even Local Wi-Fi. tailscale_capable=false because the README lists no Tailscale mode for Docker (Synology has one; Docker doesn't).
Primary documented client. iCloud + Tailscale (automatic, endpoint discovered via iCloud Drive relay file) or manual/local Wi-Fi.
